answer_relevancy.justification: The answer directly and completely addresses the question by listing all four PEAS factors with clear explanations of what each represents in the context of automated agent design.
evidence: Performance measure — how success is evaluated
Environment — the world in which the agent operates
Actuators — the mechanisms the agent uses to act
